layoutRegions.name: passkey-summary
layoutRegions.purpose: Readiness counts for passkey registrations, compliant keys, owner reviews, and policy tightening actions.

layoutRegions.name: credential-ledger
layoutRegions.purpose: Passkey inventory with user, authenticator device, resident credential state, attestation, and policy posture.

layoutRegions.name: device-and-policy-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Stale device findings, authenticator attestation, owner intent, recovery windows, and rollback-safe WebAuthn policy changes.

components.name: PasskeyRegistrationCard
components.purpose: Focusable passkey registration card with user, device, resident credential type, attestation, and posture state.
interactions: state badge distinguishes compliant, review, and tighten registrations
resident credential labels wrap without horizontal overflow

components.name: DeviceFinding
components.purpose: Stale authenticator finding with user, evidence, and passkey policy state.
interactions: focus state is visible for keyboard review

components.name: PolicyChange
components.purpose: WebAuthn policy change with rollback guard and recovery probe.
interactions: rollback guidance wraps without horizontal overflow

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
